reviews.comment:
El ACA de Dolores, parada obligada en cada ida o vuelta hacia Mar del Plata. Muy buena atención de todo el personal. Excelente servicio.

(Translated by Google)
The ACA in Dolores is a must-stop on every trip to or from Mar del Plata. The entire staff is extremely attentive. Excellent service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURxMTRxZ293RRAB

reviews.comment:
Como todas las estaciones ACA impecable y muy bien atendida. Para hacer una parada distinta, predio enorme con muchos árboles,  lugar para estacionar y mesas al aire libre. Un placer!!❤

(Translated by Google)
Like all ACA stations, it was impeccable and very well run. A great place to stop, with a huge grounds, lots of trees, parking, and outdoor tables. A real treat!! ❤
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURxLV8ycm9RRRAB

reviews.comment:
Agradable y completo parador. Arboleda y espacio para tomar un descanso, con todos los servicios y gastronomía

(Translated by Google)
Pleasant and well-equipped inn. It features a grove of trees and a place to relax, with all the amenities and food.
